name: hoc/app-sidebar
description: A high-level application-sidebar layout HOC that wires together SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarMenuTree, and the main body content area. Accepts a header (icon + title), grouped menu items, a footer, and responsive body content. Automatically handles collapsible icon-only mode and is ideal for dashboard or admin applications that need a persistent left-hand navigation rail.
useCases: SaaS admin dashboards with grouped navigation (Analytics, Users, Billing, Settings)
Documentation sites with collapsible topic-tree sidebars and article content insets
CRM or ERP platforms requiring role-based sidebar sections and quick-access footer links
Internal tooling applications where the sidebar adapts between desktop and mobile drawer modes
usage: import { AppSidebar, type AppSidebarProps, type AppSidebarMenuGroup, type AppSidebarHeaderProps } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/app-sidebar"
